headline: Accenture Stock Is Under Pressure. Its Biggest Clients Tell a Different Story.
summary: With shares beaten down by a cautious outlook, one number reveals a surprising resilience in the company's most important deals.

headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Selects Oracle (ORCL) Fusion Cloud Recruiting to Scale Global Talent Acquisition
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the oversold tech stocks to buy now. On June 11, Cognizant selected Oracle Fusion Cloud Recruiting, part of Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management, to advance its talent acquisition strategy. This partnership aims to streamline hiring workflows and enhance candidate experiences across more than 60 countries. The […]
